subject: Client comunication
body: Made aware of the problem now fixing it
Site visit completed. Customer wants pallet racking on east wall extended by two bays. Confirmed ceiling clearance at 24ft. Will update scope.

subject: Client called re: delivery schedule
body: Marcus called — wants to confirm material delivery is still on track for next Tuesday. Told him we are scheduled for Mon/Tue. He asked if crew can start earlier in the AM. Confirmed 7am start.

subject: JOB-2026-001 — Updated scope & timeline
body: Emailed Marcus updated scope doc with the two additional bays added. Included revised timeline — completion now estimated end of month. He confirmed receipt and approved the change.
Day 1 install done. East wall frame up, first 6 uprights set. Crew hit a minor concrete anchor issue — switching to wedge anchors. Back on schedule tomorrow.

subject: Called re: final inspection date
body: Called Marcus to confirm final walkthrough this Friday at 10am. He is available. Will bring updated as-built drawings.
Site walkthrough scheduled for next Thursday at 9am. Confirm with Sandra.

subject: Called to confirm quote details
body: Sandra called with questions about the mezzanine spec. Confirmed 8ft clearance, 2500lb capacity. She is comparing 2 other bids.

subject: JOB-2026-002 — Quote follow-up
body: Sent Sandra a follow-up email with updated quote including optional LED lighting upgrade. She responded positively.

subject: Pre-job kickoff call
body: Spoke with Derek about install schedule and access requirements. He confirmed forklift available on site. Start date locked.
Install completed Day 1 and 2. All uprights set, beams level. Final inspection passed. Client very happy with result.

subject: JOB-2026-003 — Completion & final invoice
body: Sent Derek the completion summary and final invoice. He paid within 3 days. Great client.
Job complete. Installed 4-tier pallet rack, 12 bays. Minor damage to one upright on delivery — replaced at no charge. Client satisfied.

subject: Called about invoice
body: Brenda called to confirm payment terms. She will pay by check within 30 days. Confirmed mailing address.
Materials arrived on site. 3 pallets of uprights, 2 pallets of beams. All accounted for. Crew starting tomorrow 7am.

subject: Called Tony re: dock equipment delay
body: Informed Tony the dock leveler is backordered 1 week. He was understanding — racking install will proceed as planned.

subject: JOB-2026-005 — Weekly update
body: Sent Tony a progress update. Racking 70% complete, dock equipment ETA updated to next Friday.
Quote sent. Included 3 options: basic, mid-tier with wire decking, and full build-out with mezzanine.

subject: Client called to discuss quote
body: Client asked about lead time and whether we can start before end of month. Told them 2-week lead on materials.

subject: Quote follow-up
body: Sent follow-up email with references from two similar jobs. Client said they are reviewing with ownership this week.

subject: Post-job check-in
body: Called client 2 weeks after completion to check on the racking. No issues reported. They are very happy.
Client requested quote for Phase 2 expansion — will follow up next month.

subject: Pre-install site check
body: Called client to confirm site access, clearances, and utility shutoff schedule before install week.
Site visit done. Ceiling height confirmed 22ft. Sprinkler clearance OK. Concrete anchor spots marked.

subject: Client question about beam capacity
body: Client asked about beam capacity for the middle bays — confirmed 5,000 lbs per pair, sent spec sheet.
Job complete. Final walkthrough passed. Invoice sent.

subject: Client called about payment terms
body: Client confirmed payment by check within 30 days. Mailing address verified.
Install complete. All bays anchored and load placards installed. Client signed off on final inspection.

subject: Job completion & invoice
body: Sent completion summary and final invoice to client. Everything came in on budget.

subject: Meeting
body: Meeting with client Thursday at 10am to do a site walkthrough and confirm final scope before we wrap up the job

subject: Following up on your quote — JOB-2026-006
body:
Hi Rachel,

I wanted to check in on the quote we sent over for JOB-2026-006. Have you had a chance to review it?

If you have any questions, want to adjust the scope, or are ready to move forward, just say the word — we're here to make it easy.

You're also welcome to call us directly at 253.826.2727.

—

Jay Farber
Owner — Pacific Construction
P: 253.826.2727
A: 1574 Thornton Ave SW, Pacific, WA 98047
